# microstatement
A Vendored version of the parts of [github:Virtuoel/Statement](https://github.com/Virtuoel/Statement)
that are required for this mod to function. It is not an api to be depended upon and won't be actively maintained. 

The design follows the original structure of the original API with changes as we see fit.
Should not be used as a porting resource since it's pegged to the current mod version, unlike the original mod
which had support for multiple versions.

This has *no* compatibility guarantees as it was made to port a single mod.
Said mod is intended to be run alone with fabric api. 

Attempts to make this compatible with other mods would involve porting the entirety of statement, which would be more
effort than what we're interested in doing. 

If someone picks up the torch and actually ports and maintains statement good for them lel.
